subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise be to God that communication, after being interrupted, is once again restored, and for this reason [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله مخابره بعد از انقطاع دوباره مجری میگردد و از اینجهت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @non-participation in politics
